doctor.unauthorized_role: Access denied. Only doctors can sign in to this portal.
doctor.blocked_account: Access denied. Your account is currently blocked. Please contact clinic administration.
doctor.workspace_initialized: Your doctor workspace has been initialized successfully. Welcome to your digital healthcare panel.
doctor.security_advisory: Security Advisory: Remember to sign out when leaving your medical computer to safeguard patient data.

common.something_went_wrong: Something went wrong. Please try again.
common.network_error: Network error. Please check your connection and try again.

login.subtitle: Sign in to manage appointments, patients, and consultations
login.email_not_verified: Please verify your email before signing in. Check your inbox for the verification link.

register.subtitle: Sign up to join our digital medical workspace
register.name_label: Full Name (with Dr. prefix will be auto-saved)
register.terms_agree: I agree to the Terms & Conditions of DocPoint Workspace

forgot_password.title: Reset Password
forgot_password.subtitle: Choose a method to reset your password
forgot_password.success_email_desc: We have sent a password reset link to your email address. It will expire in 1 hour.
forgot_password.success_otp_desc: An OTP code has been dispatched to your mobile number. Enter it to reset your password.

validation.email_invalid: Please enter a valid email address
validation.phone_invalid: Please enter a valid phone number
validation.password_length: Password must be at least 6 characters
validation.name_min_length: Full name must be at least 3 characters
validation.name_max_length: Full name must be at most 50 characters
validation.terms_required: You must agree to the Terms & Conditions

otp.title: Enter Verification Code
otp.subtitle: Enter the 6-digit code sent to {{destination}}
otp.dev_banner_hint: In development, use this code to verify:
otp.register_success: Doctor account created! Check your email and verify your account before signing in.
otp.resend_success: A new verification code has been sent.
otp.password_reset_success: Password reset successfully! You can now log in with your new password.

profile.personal_desc: Please upload a clean headshot and provide your primary details.
profile.professional_desc: Enter your medical specialization and licensing credentials.
profile.clinic_desc: State your main practice clinic name, location, and consulting fee.
profile.clinic_address_placeholder: Enter the full address of your clinic/hospital

verification.upload_desc: Please upload clear copies of your medical license, graduation degrees, and government ID for audit.
verification.pending_desc: Your profile details and registration credentials are currently being manually reviewed by the compliance administration. This typically takes up to 24-48 business hours. We will notify you once approved.
verification.rejected_desc: Some of the credential uploads provided did not match official medical boards or details were blurry. Please re-upload clean copies of your files.
